title:
Using data.govt.nz APIs
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Using data.govt.nz APIs
Visit our developer space on GitHub
- About data.govt.nz APIs The metadata and many datasets on data.govt.nz are available for use via an Application Programming Interface (API). When using our API you need to know what you can and cannot do with the data and where to find technical documentation.

### About data.govt.nz APIs
The metadata and many datasets on data.govt.nz are available for use via an Application Programming Interface (API). When using our API you need to know what you can and cannot do with the data and where to find technical documentation.
- Do's and dont's of using the data.govt.nz API Data.govt.nz's data APIs are made openly available for users and it's worth taking a moment to find out what you can and cannot do when using our APIs in your own applications.

### Do's and dont's of using the data.govt.nz API
Data.govt.nz's data APIs are made openly available for users and it's worth taking a moment to find out what you can and cannot do when using our APIs in your own applications.
- Accessing dataset metadata via API Data.govt.nz's datasets, organisations and groups can be accessed and queried as JSON date through the metadata API; this page describes how.

### Accessing dataset metadata via API
Data.govt.nz's datasets, organisations and groups can be accessed and queried as JSON date through the metadata API; this page describes how.
- Accessing machine readable data via API The data.govt.nz DataStore API allows you to access and query the rows and columns of raw data listed by agencies in machine readable CSV format via a JSON API endpoint.

### Accessing machine readable data via API
The data.govt.nz DataStore API allows you to access and query the rows and columns of raw data listed by agencies in machine readable CSV format via a JSON API endpoint.
- How to export all datasets from data.govt.nz into a CSV Using the ckanapi-exporter tool you can extract all dataset metadata into a single CSV file.

### How to export all datasets from data.govt.nz into a CSV
Using the ckanapi-exporter tool you can extract all dataset metadata into a single CSV file.
- How to export an agency's datasets as a data package Export an agencies datasets into sub-folders including any hosted or referenced data files and a json file with metadata.

### How to export an agency's datasets as a data package
Export an agencies datasets into sub-folders including any hosted or referenced data files and a json file with metadata.
